name: tmux-reboot
description: Snapshot the running tmux/claude/codex agents before a reboot and resume the exact sessions afterward, complementing tmux-resurrect which restores windows but not the agents inside them.

interface.shortDescription: Snapshot and resume tmux claude/codex agents across a reboot.
interface.longDescription: Snapshot the running tmux/claude/codex agents before a reboot and resume the exact sessions afterward, complementing tmux-resurrect which restores windows but not the agents inside them.
defaultPrompt: Snapshot my tmux sessions so I can resume after a reboot.
